1.summary: Operation Epic Fury begins. Khamenei killed. Iran retaliates across 9 countries. Insurance closes Hormuz.

7.summary: Brent hits $92 — largest weekly gain since 1982. Kuwait force majeure. AWS data center struck. Lincoln visual blackout ongoing.

9.summary: Tehran under black sky. Iraq loses 3M bbl/day. Brent hits $118. Putin’s sales pitch. Saudi embassy evacuated. Israeli officials panic.

11.summary: Mines deployed in Strait. Planet Labs blinded. Energy Secretary deletes fake tanker post. Market manipulation confirmed. Largest supply shock in history. $84 oil.
